pi_items.source: curl HTTP 200 verification + page inspection confirming header echoing functionality
curl test with custom header showing HTTP_X_AUDIT_TOKEN in response + Screaming Frog documentation confirming custom header support
curl -H 'X-Audit-Token: SF-Verified-9988' test showing value correctly echoed in HTTP_X_AUDIT_TOKEN response field
setup_task.sh line 23-24 creates EXPORT_DIR=/home/ga/Documents/SEO/exports; export_result.sh line 12 expects file at this path

privileged_info_summary: The task targets a real, publicly available test website (crawler-test.com) designed for testing web crawlers. The target page '/other/crawler_request_headers' echoes HTTP request headers in its response. The custom header 'X-Audit-Token' with value 'SF-Verified-9988' is a valid format for HTTP headers and is properly echoed by the server. Screaming Frog SEO Spider officially supports custom HTTP header configuration via its interface. The export path '/home/ga/Documents/SEO/exports/custom_header_evidence.csv' is created by the setup scripts and is the location where verification results are expected.
